global.description: The ad features a prominent logo and engaging gameplay icons with a clear promotional message.
global.main_message: Encourages players to join and compete with rewards for new users.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: StormByte logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized text logo that reads 'StormByte' in a large, prominent font.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: A simple, circular icon with a light brown dot in the center, representing gameplay elements.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: Another circular icon similar to the previous one, featuring a light brown dot.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A large, bold text reading 'StormByte' prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: A medium-sized text that reads 'Beat your rivals Free rewards for new players' in a clear, inviting font.
elements.text_content: Beat your rivals Free rewards for new players

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A small text button that says 'Learn more', encouraging user interaction.
